meaning: vi.急赶,急跑,急转,以轻快而交替的步子走动n.急赶,急跑,急转
examples: He saw the cockroach scurry under it with the gecko far behind struggling to go under.
Millions of terrified beings scurry about through senseless mazes of tunnels and lanes.
In front of a shop, a woman in a top hat and leather boots addresses men as they scurry past.
But even if they act, the rats will just scurry to another garbage can.
Prince Ranariddh then decided this was an excellent time to scurry off to Paris.
